Hey it's past 1am where I am rn and I cannot find peace and just got done with a humongous break down??? here's a bot and a random rant though 💋

The new update for creators is actually so damn helpful 😭

No more posting things out of order WE CHEERED!!!

moving on,

This weird thing I've observed on j.ai since I've been on this platform—occasionally I'll just be looking through random oc's or character bots and I'll see a caption that's like "I've never seen anyone do a bot like this/there's no bot on here like this" (or just something along the lines of that—implying that the bot is something totally new and never been done before) and I'll check cause now I'm all intrigued, JUST FOR IT TO BE THE MOST BASIC BOT IN EXISTENCE 😭😭😭 like my brother in christ WHAT. Here I am expecting to be swept off my feet and instead I am standing quite stably with no need of assistance.

I also don't understand how "low quality bots" are still being posted kinda frequently 🤨

Example:

If y'all don't know, when you make a new j.ai account, you have to wait THREE DAYS to be able to post bots publicly + bots are automatically set to private 😩

That being said, it makes it fairly hard for a bot to be posted accidentally, which leads me to believe that the people posting these bots are doing this on purpose??? like they think these are good, maybe 😭😭 idrc if someone has some English mistakes, BUT WHAT MADE YOU THINK THAT 4 LINES FOR AN INTRO WAS A GOOD IDEA 😭😭😭😭

Also I'm bringing back the bot reccs cause yeah, but not every caption cause I'm too lazy for that 🙄

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
